category_sources: Official Debian package page describes cleaning temporary-file directories by file age.
source_facts.description says tmpreaper cleans files in directories based on age.
display_name_sources: Official Debian package page identifies the package as tmpreaper.
docs_sources: Official Debian manpage is the best documentation surface for tmpreaper usage.
repo_sources: Official Debian package page provides source archives, but no official source-control project URL was identified; package/archive pages are not returned as repositories.
tags_sources: Official Debian package page tags it as a system administration utility that works with files.
source_facts.description supports cleanup, temporary-files, and file-age tags.
